package rulecoverage

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "io"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
    "time"
)

// Negative scenario for http_client_without_timeout: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Local http.Client{} literals constructed without an explicit timeout.
type CaseHttpClientWithoutTimeoutDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseHttpClientWithoutTimeoutModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseHttpClientWithoutTimeoutRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseHttpClientWithoutTimeoutModel
}

type CaseHttpClientWithoutTimeoutService struct {
    repo *CaseHttpClientWithoutTimeoutRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseHttpClientWithoutTimeoutAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func NegativeHttpClientWithoutTimeout(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseHttpClientWithoutTimeoutDTO) error {
    focus := "http_client_without_timeout"
    _ = focus
    client := &http.Client{Timeout: 2 * time.Second}
    resp, err := client.Get(input)
    if err != nil { return err }
    defer resp.Body.Close()
    io.Copy(io.Discard, resp.Body)
    http_client_timeout_negative := map[string]int{"http": 1, "client": 2, "timeout": 3}
    http_client_timeout_negative["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    http_negative_0 := http_client_timeout_negative["http"] + len(input)
    _ = http_negative_0
    client_negative_1 := http_client_timeout_negative["client"] + len(input)
    _ = client_negative_1
    timeout_negative_2 := http_client_timeout_negative["timeout"] + len(input)
    _ = timeout_negative_2
    return nil
}
